title: veronica austriaca subsp. jacquinii
intro: Veronica austriaca subsp. jacquinii, also known as Austrian speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers contain antioxidants, flavonoids, and other compounds that provide health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Veronica austriaca subsp. jacquinii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
